questions.question: Explain two advantages of using Python for IoT development compared to lower-level languages like C++.
expectedPoints: Rapid prototyping capabilities due to interpreted nature and extensive libraries
Easier maintenance and readability leading to reduced development time

questions.question: Describe the complete workflow of a Python-based IoT weather monitoring system from sensor reading to cloud storage, including the specific libraries used at each stage.
expectedPoints: Sensor reading with Adafruit_DHT or similar hardware libraries
Data processing and validation with Python's built-in functions
Cloud integration using Requests library for REST API calls
Error handling and retry mechanisms for reliability
